prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: Four horizontal progress bars stacked vertically on a dashboard display. Bar 1 "Statements: 87%": mostly green with a small red segment at the end. Bar 2 "Branches: 72%": more red showing weaker coverage, with a small warning icon. Bar 3 "Functions: 95%": almost entirely green with a gold star. Bar 4 "Lines: 84%": mostly green. Each bar has the percentage displayed on the right. A color legend shows green (covered) and red (uncovered). An overall health indicator in the corner shows "Good" in yellow-green. The dashboard has a clean, monitoring-tool aesthetic with subtle grid lines.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
